case_title: FORSYTHE FINANCE, LLC VS. TERESITA VILORIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORSYTHE FINANCE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILORIA, TERESITA $3,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $316.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,046.82, SEE SCANNED DOC
